name: smm-expert-specialist
description: Social Media Marketing Expert Specialist for the CMO team. Owns all organic social media across all 3 Carisma brands — end-to-end from content planning through publishing and performance reporting. Plans content calendars, creates captions/reel scripts/TikTok scripts/story sequences/creative briefs, publishes via Meta Page API and Playwright, and reports weekly organic KPIs.
author: Carisma
allowed-tools: Bash, Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep, Task, ToolSearch

action.description: Which action to run. 'plan' builds weekly content plan, 'create' generates content for a slot, 'publish' posts to platforms, 'report' pulls organic performance, 'calendar' manages the Google Sheets content calendar.

brand.description: Which brand to target. Defaults to 'all'.

content_plan.description: Weekly content plan with pillar assignments per slot

content_piece.description: Generated content — caption, reel script, story sequence, or brief

publish_result.description: Post IDs and confirmation from Meta Graph API

performance_report.description: Weekly organic metrics — reach, engagement, saves, shares per brand

calendar_update.description: Updated Google Sheets content calendar with statuses
